backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor that wires together blob storage, authorization, user approval, and session management, exposing endpoints for approval requests, session CRUD, and admin-gated operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—Internet Identity student login and II-based student route guards—to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing key changes and responsibilities for each page, layout, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title, favicon, viewport meta, and mounting the app via /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with the full route tree, a React Query client, and a top-level ErrorBoundary with 404 and error fallback UIs.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Simple animated spinner component with three size variants (sm, md, lg) rendered as a spinning bordered circle.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: Popover notification bell component that filters and displays per-student notifications from the local store, supporting mark-as-read and mark-all-read actions.
frontend/src/components/ReceiptModal.tsx: A modal component that displays a detailed payment receipt including amount, status, student name, course, session type, hours, price per hour, UPI transaction ID, and date.
frontend/src/components/StatCard.tsx: A reusable card component for displaying a statistic with a title, value, icon, optional subtitle, and one of four color themes.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: A small badge component that renders a colored pill label for a given payment/session status (pending, approved, rejected, etc.).
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: A link button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat to a hardcoded phone number, used for booking demo sessions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendance.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching a student's attendance records and summary, and a mutation hook for marking attendance via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCanisterHealth.ts: A hook that periodically pings the ICP canister to check if it is online, detecting IC0508 stopped-canister errors and exposing an online/checking state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useMaterials.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting study materials for a student via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting tutoring sessions for a student via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a deep-blue/gold design token system with light and dark theme variants.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin shell layout with a collapsible sidebar, navigation links (dashboard, students, courses, sessions, etc.), a pending-payments badge, canister health indicator, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/layouts/RootLayout.tsx: Top-level layout component that initializes the localStorage store on mount and renders child routes via an Outlet.
frontend/src/layouts/StudentLayout.tsx: Student portal shell layout with a responsive sidebar, Internet Identity-based auth guard, navigation links for student pages, and a logout handler that clears II and auth state.
frontend/src/lib/auth.ts: Thin auth helper module that reads/writes/clears a JSON auth state object in localStorage, with role-check utilities for admin and student and a helper to retrieve the current student's principal ID.
frontend/src/lib/store.ts: localStorage-backed data store defining TypeScript interfaces and CRUD helpers for all app entities (students, courses, sessions, materials, payments, notifications, attendance) with default seed data.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for merging Tailwind class names (cn) and formatting currency, dates, and datetimes for the Indian locale.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AttendanceManag: Admin page for viewing and marking student attendance, fetching approved students from the backend and sessions/attendance records via hooks, though backend attendance marking is currently disabled due to missing student principals.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Courses.tsx: Admin courses management page allowing creation, editing, toggling active status, and deletion of courses stored in the local store, with a modal form and delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying summary statistics (total, active, pending students, sessions, materials, approved payments) fetched from the backend actor and local store, along with recent students and sessions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentMa: Admin page for managing per-student learning materials, allowing admins to select an approved student, add new materials (with title, file URL, type, and related course), and delete existing ones from localStorage-backed store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentSe: Admin page for scheduling and deleting tutoring sessions for approved students, storing session details (date, time, duration, Google Meet link, topic) in the localStorage-backed store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Materials.tsx: Admin materials page that fetches approved students from both the ICP backend and localStorage, then allows admins to add or delete file-link-based materials stored locally under 'adminMaterials'.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Notifications.t: Admin page for composing and sending notifications (broadcast or targeted to a specific approved student) with type selection, and for deleting existing notifications from the localStorage store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Payments.tsx: Admin payments page that lists, filters, approves (generating access and unique codes), and rejects student payment records stored in localStorage, with error handling for ICP canister unavailability.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Sessions.tsx: Admin page for scheduling tutoring sessions, allowing admins to create sessions for approved students with date, time, meet link, and topic, storing data in localStorage. Also displays and allows deletion of existing sessions with optional filtering by student.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Students.tsx: Admin page that lists all students by merging backend payments with localStorage records, supporting approve/reject actions with unique code generation and copy functionality. Handles IC0508 canister errors gracefully by falling back to an empty array.
frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx: Public landing page displaying a navbar, hero section, stats, feature highlights, and testimonials, with WhatsApp contact links and dynamic course count pulled from the local store.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page supporting both Internet Identity (student) and hardcoded email/password (admin) authentication, with approval status checking via the backend actor before redirecting students to their dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Simple static page displayed after a failed payment, showing an error message with links to retry payment or return to the student dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Payment success page that marks the corresponding payment as approved in the local store and adds a notification, then displays a confirmation UI with links to the dashboard and payments page.
frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx: Public registration form where new students select a course, session type, and hours, submit a UPI transaction ID, and get saved as a pending student and payment entry in the local store.
frontend/src/pages/student/Book.tsx: Student-facing booking page where students select a course, session type, hours, and provide a UPI transaction ID to submit a payment/session booking request stored in localStorage. Displays a success confirmation with payment ID after submission.
frontend/src/pages/student/Courses.tsx: Student page displaying courses the logged-in student is enrolled in, showing pricing for group and one-on-one sessions along with material counts. Shows an empty state with a WhatsApp contact button if no courses are enrolled.
frontend/src/pages/student/Dashboard.tsx: Student dashboard showing a welcome banner and stats (total classes, upcoming sessions, materials, completed sessions) pulled from localStorage. Displays upcoming sessions and recent materials in summary cards with links to full views.
frontend/src/pages/student/Materials.tsx: Student-facing page that loads and displays study materials assigned to the logged-in student, grouped by course, with file type icons and optional download links.
frontend/src/pages/student/MyMaterials.t: Alternative student materials page that reads from localStorage (`adminMaterials`) and displays materials assigned to the student by email or ID, with a link to view each file.
frontend/src/pages/student/MySessions.ts: Student sessions page that reads from localStorage (`adminSessions`) and displays upcoming and past classes with attendance status badges and a Google Meet join link.
frontend/src/pages/student/Payments.tsx: Student payments page showing a summary of total spent, approved, and pending payments, with a list of individual payment records and a receipt modal.
frontend/src/pages/student/Profile.tsx: Student profile page displaying contact info, account status, enrolled courses, and a copyable access code for approved students.
frontend/src/pages/student/Sessions.tsx: Student sessions page that fetches sessions from the store and separates them into upcoming and past lists, rendering each with date, time, duration, and a Join button for upcoming sessions.
frontend/src/routeTree.ts: Defines the full TanStack Router route tree for the app, including public routes, admin routes (guarded by localStorage role check), and student routes (guarded by Internet Identity principal). Creates and exports the configured router instance.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist values in sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based design tokens, brand colors (navy/gold), extended border radius, box shadows, and animation keyframes, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document describing the Student Course Management Platform's architecture, authentication approach (Internet Identity for students, hardcoded email for admin), known build issues, existing implemented features, and pending feature requests.
